title: kadua st-johnii
intro: Kadua st-johnii, also known as the Kadua or St. John's Kadua, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Kadua st-johnii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into teas or infusions, and its essential oils can be extracted for topical use.
